title: ANC - Changes persist after restarting the device
scenario: ANC Mode and Transparency Mode settings do not persist after device restart
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app → Home screen.
2. Tap on the connected [Device Name] to open Device Settings.
4. Set ANC Mode or Transparency Mode to any value (e.g., High ANC or Full Transparency).
5. Restart the device (power cycle the headset/speakerphone).
6. Open Poly Studio Mobile app → Home screen again.
7. Tap on the connected [Device Name] to open Device Settings.
expected: The previously set ANC Mode and Transparency Mode values persist and are displayed correctly after restarting the device.
